description: Style NoteEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aneri considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Product DetailsMulti-hued kurta made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, is sleeveless with golden piping on the armhole, embroidery on the front and a vented hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash separately in cold water using a mild detergentModel StatisticsThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
